abilities.shortEffect: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is always successful fleeing from wild battles, even if trapped by a move or ability.

abilities.shortEffect: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.effect:
Whenever this Pokémon has a major status ailment, it has 1.5× its Speed.  This Pokémon is not affected by the usual Speed cut from paralysis.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved.

abilities.shortEffect: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a Dark, Ghost, or Bug move.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's Speed rises one stage with each hit from a damaging Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type move.
